## Description

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Link any related issues with "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Performance improvement (`perf:`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] CI / tooling (`ci:`)
- [ ] Breaking change (add `BREAKING CHANGE:` to the commit footer)

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run mypy .` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest --cov=src` passes
- [ ] New or changed public API is documented
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
